name: Swallowtail Butterspy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蝶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>刺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>客</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アゲハ
desc: When another monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses ATK equal to the battle damage inflicted.
mnst_eff: When another monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses ATK equal to the battle damage inflicted.
eff: When another monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses ATK equal to the battle damage inflicted.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
